name: remove_advanced_screen
description: Prevent the Advanced/server-connection screen from appearing after sign-out by keeping the default server URL intact when disconnecting

replacements.find:
func disconnect() {
        serverConfigStore.removeAllServers()
        dependencies?.refreshServices()
        backendConfig = nil
        currentUser = nil
        phase = .serverConnection
        serverURL = ""
        apiKey = ""
        stopTokenRefreshTimer()
    }
